raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has not adequately removed flammable vegetation to prevent devastating wildfires.",
    "Disaster prevention and response is a priority that the California Legislature needs to address.",
    "The Republican proposals aim to streamline wildfire prevention projects and improve disaster response.",
    "California's income tax credit covers 40% of the costs for older homeowners to harden their homes against wildfires.",
    "Wildfire fuels reduction projects can be authorized without complying with CEQA for noncommercial purposes.",
    "A bill exists that exempts all wildfire prevention projects from CEQA requirements.",
    "Air quality management districts are required to process permits for controlled burns within ten business days.",
    "Utility undergrounding projects are exempt from CEQA to expedite permitting and enhance grid safety.",
    "Funding for wildfire prevention is redirected from High-Speed Rail to upgrade water infrastructure and wildfire prevention efforts.",
    "Penalties for aggravated arson increase if a wildfire destroys more than 500 acres.",
    "The California Wildfire Mitigation Program provides financial assistance to help families fortify their homes against wildfires.",
    "Fuel treatment projects on coastal areas are exempted from Coastal Commission permitting mandates.",
    "There is an expansion of CEQA exemptions for prescribed fire and fuel reduction projects for communities with limited evacuation routes.",
    "A pilot program will exempt fire safety egress route projects from CEQA in high fire hazard severity zones.",
    "The California Air Resources Board is required to include wildland and forest fire greenhouse gas emissions in its Scoping Plan.",
    "Flying drones that interfere with emergency responders at fire scenes is punishable as a felony.",
    "Burglary or theft in declared emergency areas is classified as a felony, increasing penalties for such crimes.",
    "A grant program for financial assistance will support local communities when federal disaster assistance is unavailable.",
    "The U.S. House of Representatives passed the 'Fix Our Forests Act' to streamline permitting for health and fuels reduction projects."
  ]
}
```
